case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. VINCENA WHITAKER ET AL

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 75053145) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
